title: Eight years shipping production systems.
subtitle: Ali Cloud → AWS migrations, multi-cluster Kubernetes, observability from scratch, and a DevOps UI that cut toil by 70%.

items.summary: Leading platform engineering across 1000+ Kubernetes clusters and building an AI-powered DevOps assistant for 5000+ engineers.
bullets: Operate 1000+ EKS/GKE/AKS clusters spanning 14 regions via a unified GitOps control plane.
Designed the observability fabric: Prometheus + Thanos + VictoriaMetrics with per-tenant SLOs at PB-scale.
Shipping an LLM-assisted SRE copilot (Langfuse-traced) that triages alerts and auto-remediates low-risk incidents.
Own the platform roadmap — cluster lifecycle, cost, compliance, and developer experience for 5000+ users.

items.summary: Led the PG2 migration from Ali Cloud to AWS, built the Release Engineering UI, and won two Rockstar awards.
bullets: Migrated 50+ microservices from Ali Cloud to AWS — zero customer-visible downtime, cost-optimized by ~30%.
Built a Release Engineering UI that reduced toil by 30% and became the default deploy surface for multiple verticals.
Designed and shipped a Kubernetes Operator (CRD-backed) to automate HPA patching on configurable schedules.
Set up monitoring from scratch — Prometheus + Grafana + APM — with 99% infrastructure uptime.
SME for Redis — hardened replication, persistence, and client patterns across production workloads.

items.summary: Capacity planning, cost optimization, and infrastructure security across 15+ microservices.
bullets: Automated deployments for 15+ microservices on AWS EC2 + ECS.
Achieved a 30% reduction in cloud spend via right-sizing and workload automation.
Hardened infrastructure security and onboarded services to AppDynamics for full-stack APM.
Awarded for Outstanding JVM Hygiene — automation across multiple services.

items.summary: Built the DevOps UI, led DR migration on Kubernetes, and moved monitoring from commercial tools to open source.
bullets: Built a custom DevOps UI in React with roles-based auth — cut toil by 70% across verticals.
Led the DR migration to Kubernetes and designed the monitoring foundation.
Transitioned monitoring to open-source (Prometheus + Grafana + ELK) — flexibility + cost savings.
Migrated infrastructure from physical DC to AWS with minimal downtime.
Received the Thank You Award for Big Billion Day reliability.
